verifier_values.criteria: Determines the average daily usage for Low data, postpaid plans to be 3390.87MB +/- 0.05MB.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the mean of data_consumed_mb calculated from the subset of data_usage_daily for active plans in 2025 by plan type and usage category.
